items.text: Formalization of the Context Firewall via REPOMAP with Domain Axioms, documentation of adherence patterns with empirical metrics, definition of memory rules MEM-01 and MEM-02, and domain assignment model LLM/HUM/MIX.

Formalización del Cortafuegos de Contexto mediante REPOMAP con Axiomas de Dominio, documentación de patrones de adherencia con métricas empíricas, definición de reglas MEM-01 y MEM-02, y modelo de asignación LLM/HUM/MIX.
Kairos governance system migrated from version 3.5.0 to 4.0.0, with directory restructuring and addition of .agents/knowledge/.
Migración de Kairos v3.5.0 a v4.0.0, reestructuración de directorios y adición de .agents/knowledge/.
RULES.md defines rule MEM-02: retain as closing step of governance workflows.
RULES.md defines rule MEM-01: recall at session start precedes reading physical files.
RULES.md define MEM-01 (recall precede a leer archivos) y MEM-02 (retain como cierre de workflows).
REPOMAP assigns .kilo/ as Invisible Infrastructure.
REPOMAP assigns docs/ (excluding MASTER-SPEC) as Documentation.
REPOMAP assigns .agents/ as Active Governance.
REPOMAP assigns docs/MASTER-SPEC.md as Domain Axiom.
Domain assignment: LLM for autonomous execution, HUM for blocked tasks, MIX for shared evaluation.
Kairós adherence patterns documented with empirical metrics.
REPOMAP define un Cortafuegos de Contexto con Axiomas de Dominio.
docs/ contiene MASTER-SPEC, TODO, MEMORY, CHANGELOG, USER-DECISIONS, REPOMAP y RULES.
Estructura .agents/ con rules, roles, workflows, skills y knowledge.
Kairós governance system v4.0.0 framework para gobernar agentes de IA.
kairos repository contains generic MASTER-SPEC.md template.
Kairos REPOMAP: .agents/ Active Governance, docs/MASTER-SPEC.md Domain Axiom, docs/ secondary.
Constitution V0.99: agent as catalyst between convergence and exploration forces.
Kairos .agents/ directory with roles, rules, skills, workflows, templates.
Kairos governance system v3.5.0 framework for AI-assisted development.
